item.title: She Said It Was A Game Until He Never Got Out
item.description: Sarah Boone told investigators that her boyfriend became trapped inside a suitcase during what she described as a game gone wrong. Video evidence and witness testimony later became central to a case that drew widespread attention and intense public scrutiny.

media:content.media:title: She Said It Was A Game Until He Never Got Out
media:content.media:description: Sarah Boone told investigators that her boyfriend became trapped inside a suitcase during what she described as a game gone wrong. Video evidence and witness testimony later became central to a case that drew widespread attention and intense public scrutiny.

item.title: A Three Year Old Vanished While Playing Outside
item.description: William Tyrrell disappeared from his foster grandmother's home in rural Australia in 2014 while playing in the yard. Despite one of the country's largest investigations, no definitive answers have emerged about what happened to the three year old.

media:content.media:title: A Three Year Old Vanished While Playing Outside
media:content.media:description: William Tyrrell disappeared from his foster grandmother's home in rural Australia in 2014 while playing in the yard. Despite one of the country's largest investigations, no definitive answers have emerged about what happened to the three year old.

item.title: A Teenager's Crime Shocked An Entire Nation
item.description: Christa Pike was just 18 years old when she became the youngest woman sentenced to death in the United States during the modern era. The case drew widespread attention because of the victim's age, the brutality of the crime, and Pike's role in planning and carrying it out.

media:content.media:title: A Teenager's Crime Shocked An Entire Nation
media:content.media:description: Christa Pike was just 18 years old when she became the youngest woman sentenced to death in the United States during the modern era. The case drew widespread attention because of the victim's age, the brutality of the crime, and Pike's role in planning and carrying it out.

item.title: A Friendship Betrayal Led To A Tragic Ending
item.description: Adrianne Reynolds believed she was spending time with friends, but the relationship had taken a darker turn behind the scenes. The investigation that followed uncovered a devastating betrayal and became one of Illinois' most heartbreaking true crime cases.

media:content.media:title: A Friendship Betrayal Led To A Tragic Ending
media:content.media:description: Adrianne Reynolds believed she was spending time with friends, but the relationship had taken a darker turn behind the scenes. The investigation that followed uncovered a devastating betrayal and became one of Illinois' most heartbreaking true crime cases.
